title: MIN HE
text:
Reach me per email
  
  
    
     Github
  

  
  
Research areas include VLN, large language models, machine learning, intelligent agents, and embodied intelligence.



2026-Present: Master of Science, Nanyang Technological University, specializing in Machine Learning, under supervision of Prof. Lihua Xie.
2021-2025: Bachelor of Engineering (Honours), Chongqing University of Technology, majoring in Computer Science and Technology, under supervision of Prof. Xiaofei Zhu.





Lenovo (Shanghai) Information Technology Co., Ltd. (LR Robotics Algorithm) — Embodied AI Research Intern (Robotics) 2026.05-2026.08


The SOTA-level dual-system navigation model DualVLN (based on InternVLA-N1) was successfully adapted and deployed on the Lenovo Morningstar MX robot. The decision-making layer (System 2) fine-tunes QwenVL-2.5 (7B) to generate 2D pixel-space sub-goals, while the control layer (System 1) utilizes a Flow-Matching (NextDiT) model to predict 32-step continuous physical trajectories, achieving a 94.37% navigation success rate in real-world scenarios.





OmniVLN: Open-Set Instance-Level 3D Semantic Mapping with Rotating LiDAR and Panoramic Vision First Author, IEEE RA-L (SCI Q2 TOP, Under Review)


To address the issues of missing spatial reasoning and context explosion in large-scale 3D scenes using LLM, an omnidirectional perception-driven embodied intelligence agent framework was developed based on Python, PyTorch, and ROS2. By constructing a dynamic scene graph as the agent’s world model and combining it with a multi-resolution spatial attention mechanism, complex long-range navigation in zero-shot environments was achieved with a success rate of 93.18%, while reducing token costs by up to 69.98%.


A Review of Data Fusion and Deep Learning Models for Multimodal Sentiment Analysis. First Author，Published to ECAI，DOI: 10.5220/0013189700004568





Outstanding graduates of Chongqing, 2025
Outstanding Bachelor’s Thesis Award, 2025
National Scholarship, 2024
Second Prize in the National Undergraduate Data Statistics and Analysis Competition, 2023
Finalist Award in the CCF National Algorithm Elite Competition, 2023
Third Prize in the National Finals of the Team Programming Ladder Competition, 2023

title: 中文简历
text:
何旻，男，中共党员。现就读于南洋理工大学电子与电气工程学院，研究方向为具身智能、视觉语言导航、大模型智能体等。2025年毕业于重庆理工大学计算机科学与工程学院，获工学荣誉学士学位。

邮箱：MHE009@e.ntu.edu.sg
地址：新加坡南洋大道50号，邮编639798
个人主页：https://qiyuanlanniao.github.io

title: 中文简历
text:
实习经历

联想（上海）信息技术有限公司（LR Robotics Algorithm）- 机器人具身智能研究实习生 2026.05-2026.08


将 SOTA 级双系统导航模型 DualVLN（基于 InternVLA-N1） 成功适配并部署于联想晨星MX机器人真机。决策层（System 2）微调 QwenVL-2.5（7B）生成 2D 像素亚目标点；控制层（System 1）基于 Flow-Matching（NextDiT）模型预测32步连续物理轨迹，真实场景导航成功率94.37%。

title: 中文简历
text:
科研经历

OmniVLN：面向空地视觉语言导航的全方位3D感知和令牌高效LLM推理 First Author, IEEE RA-L (SCI Q2 TOP, Under Review)


针对大规模3D场景中LLM空间推理缺失及上下文爆炸问题，基于 Python , PyTorch与 ROS2开发了一套全向感知驱动的具身智能Agent框架。通过构建动态场景图作为智能体世界模型，配合多分辨率空间注意力机制，实现了Zero-shot环境下的复杂长程导航，成功率达93.18%，并将 Token成本最高压缩了69.98%。


A Review of Data Fusion and Deep Learning Models for Multimodal Sentiment Analysis. First Author，Published to ECAI，DOI: 10.5220/0013189700004568
